scripts.backfill:registration-rewards: node -e "import('./src/config/db.js').then(async ({ connectDatabase }) => { const { migrateMissingRegistrationRewards } = await import('./src/services/migrationService.js'); await connectDatabase(); const result = await migrateMissingRegistrationRewards(); console.log(result); process.exit(0); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"
